narrative:
London 1-A (precinct in Madison County) has 449 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.6 percentage points.
